title: Build a multi-agent system using ADK & MCP
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a production-grade multi-agent system using Google's Agent Development Kit, the Model Context Protocol, and Gemini 3 Flash. The example "Critics Cut" is a multilingual context-aware AI assistant for content discovery.
writeup: This tutorial walks through building a multi-agent system with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK), the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Gemini 3 Flash. The worked example, "Critics Cut," is a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant for content discovery, showing how the pieces combine into a production-grade setup. The takeaways center on coordinating multiple agents, using MCP as the connective layer, and grounding the design in a concrete discovery use case.
